hero.headline: Stone, considered.
hero.subhead: Bespoke slabs and architectural surfaces for discerning studios.

editors_letter.label: The editor's letter
editors_letter.pull_quote: “We believe material truth begins in the quarry—and ends in the quiet confidence of a room perfectly resolved.”
editors_letter.body_1: For over a generation, we have partnered with architects and interior designers who treat stone not as decoration, but as structure, atmosphere, and permanence. Our mandate is singular: to source and finish the world’s most exceptional marbles, limestones, and granites—with provenance you can specify and character that cannot be replicated.
editors_letter.body_2: Each relationship begins with listening. We travel to quarries, document veining and tone under natural light, and curate lots that honor your intent. What arrives on site is not inventory; it is a considered extension of your vision.

sourcing.label: Authenticity & sourcing
sourcing.body: We work directly with quarry partners across China, tracing each block from extraction through fabrication. Documentation, lot photography, and physical samples ensure what you specify is what your project receives—without compromise.

bulgari_black.label: I — Bulgari Black
bulgari_black.heading: Depth in monochrome
bulgari_black.body: A deep black ground struck through with dramatic white veining. Suited to hearths, feature planes, and furniture elements where contrast and polish do the speaking.

china_arabescato.label: II — China Arabescato
china_arabescato.heading: Luminous veining
china_arabescato.body: A clean white ground with dramatic grey movement — a luxurious answer to premium European whites. Ideal for kitchens, gallery baths, and reception volumes where daylight reveals the stone’s character.

victoria_green.label: III — Victoria Green
victoria_green.heading: Living colour
victoria_green.body: A rich green ground threaded with elegant gold-accented veining. Specify for dining tables, kitchen islands, and feature walls where colour becomes the architecture.

contact.heading: Let’s specify something enduring
contact.body: Share project timelines, material intent, and quantities. We will return a curated slab recommendation, technical guidance, and sample strategy.

home.title: Culture Stone — Luxury Marble & Stone Supplier
home.description: Culture Stone supplies bespoke marble, limestone, and granite slabs for architects and interior designers worldwide. Headquartered in Chengdu, China.

catalog.title: Stone Catalog — The Signature Gallery | Culture Stone
catalog.description: Browse premium marble, limestone, and granite surfaces sourced directly from quarries across China. Blue Emerald, China Arabescato, Hermes Grey, and more.

contact.description: Specify natural stone for your project with Culture Stone. Serving architects, designers, and hospitality groups worldwide.
